core_mechanism: an inclusion preorder on pairs of vectors defined by convex-combination nesting (each vector of the 'larger' pair lies on the segment between the two vectors of the 'smaller' pair), whose unique rotation-invariant scalar completion is the cosine of the angle between the two vectors (inner-product / cosine similarity)
brief_reason: The abstract states the measure is 'represented as an inclusion preorder over pairs of subjective models: each model in the more agreeable pair is a convex combination of the two models in the less agreeable pair,' and that 'the measure's unique rotation-invariant scalar completion is cosine similarity.'
